they dont random this stuff
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2002 at 12:18 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775935205
184 posts
fyi none of this stuff gets random. a guild capable of doing st has a point system you just dont give it to the main tank or to the one that got the best roll you go to raid accumulate points and then when its your ime at loot you get what drops if it is for your class if its not then you continue at least thats the way it works on my guild. another thing guys with pop coming out and the new cazic and all that is going on now in eq sooner or later st will not only be to the big shoot guilds soon 755 of the eq players some how will take part in these kind of raids sooner or later same as tov and the hi lvl places in luclin then the new shoot guilds will have pop to play with.

just my 2cp
▲ Page top
RE: they dont random this stuff

# Jul 12 2003 at 5:00 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592759167585
270 posts
I didn't understand the last half of your post. Please don't use run on sentences.
▲ Page top
ST
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2001 at 7:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771179918
1 post
hah st not farmed, thats hilarious. how do you think they kill Ntov? primals my friend. my guild is only guild on vz with primals so far. we can clear all warders but one with 24 people, keep in mind its a pvp server so no aes and stuff so our strats have to be adjusted and what not so i bet on a blue server where there is a lot more ntov loot i bet this could be done with 18 or so but frankly there isnt much loot to be had after your melees get primals. the enchanter gloves in ST are nice, that mask freaking owns for a chanter and resist stones own (expesially for pvp) rest of drops are just toys for casters and priests. also most ubr guilds dont random (i dont know of one that does) its usually handled by an officer or goes off a point system based on number of raids attended and such. only thing ive randomed on since lvl 45 was twink loots that no one wanted for main. NBG and awarding is the way to go. btw dont say stuff u have no idea about, like this one guild ont his server that im on does this and this and this, you dont know unless your in that guild and believe me 10 hrs playtime is nothing for loots. i had at least 100 days played before i got anything remotely ubr.

check out http://www.defiantvz.com to see our site :)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 27 2001 at 8:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i know for a fact that some guilds have enuff ST keys for everyone in thier guild to go on a raid. i know that on my server, lanys, the guild visions(conquest) has many ST keys and have raped the tomb up and down and over again. also they were the first guild to even get close to killing the sleeper, so close even that a gm zoned in and despawned him, which just goes to show that they arent rdy to have him killed yet... thats how much verant underestimates the pc's. they dont think we can do anything unless they say so, well theyre wrong!
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 03 2001 at 6:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Actually I don't like randoming at all. It sucks. I am in a 50+ guild and have spent a total of 259.5 hours raiding Kael, DN, SG, PoH, PoG, PoF.. you name it. That is more than 10 days playtime mind you, and I haven't got ********* Because of that stupid randoming. While others, same class and level, have gotten their epic, quest armor, necro focuses.. most of them at least 5 uber items each.
RE: Randoming...
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2002 at 4:07 PM Rating: Decent

__DEL__1591793092830
5 posts
if the mansi herb dropped in Chardok .. often the guild fighting there spent several hours and there will be ALOT of necros haging out .. i have witnessed many of these drops randomed

and you will agree getting peopl eto go farm this drop is a real pain .. so i can totaly see how he can loose out on an epic drop to a random ..
▲ Page top
RE: Randoming...
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2002 at 12:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775935205
184 posts
well you should join a guild that has a point system if you raid that much thats how my guild is and im happy cause i know that when it comes time to loot im on th top cause i raid a lot for those who dont raid a lot well then they ge left out or they go to the other raids were they got a chance at random. another thing is with a poin system once a tank is equiped to a certain deggre he will no longer qualify for other loot unless that pice is a big upgrade to what he has.

no all guilds are this big to have a point syste but ant least in your case the raid leader or guild leader should award some kind of loot to you for spending so much time rading

just my 2 cp.
▲ Page top

I totally agree with you.

I'm the only person I know that managed to roll a zero on a 795 random.

Need before Greed and rolls on the times no-one needs is fine.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 08 2002 at 12:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The reason you dont get the loot isn't because you get low /randoms, its because you're a necromancer. a LEVEL 57 necromancer. Guilds would much rather equip their melees, clerics, chanters, and wizards before they ever equip a mana pump.
Uber Loots
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2001 at 3:42 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I love this site, and read every day - the updates and new items are a fave. And every day, I look at the latest uberloot scored by some uberguild or another, with page after page of flamage following it.

"This is clearly made for (WAR/ENC/CLR/NEC/DRU/RNG/SMN/etc)s,
I can't believe you'd say it was made for (WAR/ENC/CLR/NEC/DRU/RNG/SMN/etc)s".

A) 95% of us will NEVER see ANY of this crap.

B) With a mouth like that, you won't be invited along on the raid.

C) Do you really think any of us care if you think it's worthwhile? If it's really made for your <class>, then spend the time and effort with you guild to get it. Just shut up about it already.

Whatever happened to information? You know, rarity of drop, /locs, HELPFUL stuff.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 3:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) play the game, send in complaints to verizon and live with what you got, or go do something useful with your life.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 12 2001 at 10:24 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My guess is you'll never be on a raid.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 10 2001 at 10:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I really wish that Verant would stop making high level shared items. At least cut them back a bit. I'd really love to see more items that class dependant.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 12:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) What you been smoking?
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 1:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) LOL man first off if you are in a Guild Powerful enough to get this item from Sleepers tomb Loot Issues are just about non existent other wise your guild would have split up long ago most likely Officers would get first or who ever was your Best Caster etc..... who the hell still rolls on loot in Large guild raides how Gay Rolling for items is left for pickup grps in Seb etc.... Any guild that rolls for items of this caliber and has made it to Sleepers to should be shot
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 11:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Only people who use that stupid point system suck... Random is better, would be great if /random worked better tho... 1/3 of the high rolls always from same people
RE: Getting sick of shared items
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2001 at 4:03 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361254562
View User Forum
119 posts
Well, I think you just pointed out why randoming in a major guild isn't a great method. There are players that bust their hump all the time, and seemingly never win rolls, while it's the ones with gear 4 times better winning stuff even if they have better. That last sentance is a bit exagerated, but I've seen it happen.

With a point style system (doesn't have to be a point system, but similar in nature), a high powered guild can track who puts in the time and effort in raids, and yes...those people should probably get that nice item before someone that rarely does squat for their guild.

Randoms can work fine for some, even in major guild situations. But it's also total luck and has absolutely nothing to do with who has payed their dues compared to the next guy, or who can best use an item. With such a system, I don't worry about /randoming for items when I'm with guild. If something drops and I can use it, but someone else would likely make better use, I don't begrudge them it and know that the correct person got the item. I also know I'll get items I want/need sooner or later.

In the end, everyone try to have an open mind. No one way is the correct way, but we can all have our opinions, otherwise things wouldn't be interesting. hehe Peace!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 2:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Man your a total ***** My Guild still Randoms loot unless it is Planes armor & it is that persons last piece to make the set then they default. Everyone in my guild is considered Equal. No one person better than another, this even goes for the Guild leader & officers. We are one of the larger guilds on my server & we seem to get along fine with this. The way it is done is that only people may inter if they plan on using the item on their Main char. You can not go in if someones main does not have the item, & all you want it for is for a twink or to sell. Works well. That thing with one guild member being more important than another is BS. The only thing that works on is spells. No since in a lower level going on a spell if some higher level needs it & can use it allready.
RE: Getting sick of shared items
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2003 at 11:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759046203
97 posts
"My Guild still Randoms loot"
"Everyone in my guild is considered Equal."

That sounds nice, but what it really means is that everyone has the same chance to get an item, whether the person is the most dedicated member of the guild, or some slacker who plays 2 hours a month. Sure, if all other things were equal, /random would be a fair way to award gear. But it's actually more fair to hand it out based on a point system.
▲ Page top
RE: Getting sick of shared items

6 posts

#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 2:03 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this sounds like how people(bigger guilds) farm fungi tunics(sell for 35kpp on my server) ....thats quite hard for them to do, its like 4hrs of non-stop action and they average 4 of these a week, im sure this will be around that difficulty and that things like this will be sold around 35kpp also(based off the stats) but while it will be Needed by the casters they will just farm this for the guild itself.......................................................................................................................................................................EQ is dumb. quit while you can

# Jun 25 2001 at 12:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760131119

330 posts
I agree with you on almost all points but one. This mask is not the best in the game. :p It's very good and I would be honored to wear something that came from the Sleeper's Tomb, sure. But I'd much rather be wearing an eye of Cazic-Thule, for example.

I fear the day that the Sleeper's Tomb is farmed for anything. I doubt even FoH hangs arround there too often, if at all, considering that they are probably too busy rapeing VP over and over hoping to find new 'phat lewtz' to post and getting even one key to the Sleeper's Tomb requires a huge effort that I just don't see them making probably being satified with VP. :p Enough ranting. Go play EQ! It's the most fun waste of my time that I currently know of.
